## Variables

<a name="ErrHistoryEmpty"></a>

```go
var (
    ErrHistoryEmpty  = errors.New("wallpaper history is empty")
    ErrAlreadyOldest = errors.New("already at the oldest wallpaper in history")
    ErrAlreadyNewest = errors.New("already at the most recent wallpaper in history")
)
```

<a name="Append"></a>
## func [Append](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L73>)

```go
func Append(h *models.History, entry models.HistoryEntry)
```

Append adds a new entry at the front of the history \(newest\-first\), resets CurrentIndex to 0, and trims the list to MaxEntries.

<a name="DefaultPath"></a>
## func [DefaultPath](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L23>)

```go
func DefaultPath() (string, error)
```

DefaultPath returns the path to the history file, located in a "history" subdirectory next to the executable: \<exe\_dir\>/history/gopaper.json

<a name="Load"></a>
## func [Load](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L32>)

```go
func Load(path string) (*models.History, error)
```

Load reads the history file from path. Returns an empty History if the file does not exist.

<a name="Next"></a>
## func [Next](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L96>)

```go
func Next(h *models.History) (models.HistoryEntry, error)
```

Next moves CurrentIndex to a newer entry and returns it.

<a name="Prev"></a>
## func [Prev](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L83>)

```go
func Prev(h *models.History) (models.HistoryEntry, error)
```

Prev moves CurrentIndex to an older entry and returns it.

<a name="Save"></a>
## func [Save](<https://github.com/lucasassuncao/gopaper/blob/main/internal/history/history.go#L54>)

```go
func Save(path string, h *models.History) error
```

Save writes the history to path, creating parent directories as needed.
